name: swiftui-expert-skill
description: Use when writing, reviewing, or refactoring SwiftUI code for iOS or macOS, including state management, view composition, performance, Liquid Glass adoption, or Instruments `.trace` capture/analysis for hangs, hitches, CPU hotspots, or excessive view updates.

interface.longDescription: Use when writing, reviewing, or refactoring SwiftUI code for iOS or macOS, including state management, view composition, performance, Liquid Glass adoption, or Instruments `.trace` capture/analysis for hangs, hitches, CPU hotspots, or excessive view updates.
